metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when cycles or instructions are unsupported; Undefined when instructions are zero
metrics.physical_meaning: 平均每退休一條指令消耗的 CPU cycles。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when frontend stall or cycles are unsupported; Undefined when cycles are zero
metrics.physical_meaning: Frontend 無法供應可 issue operation 的 stall 比例近似。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when backend stall or cycles are unsupported; Undefined when cycles are zero
metrics.physical_meaning: Backend 等待資料、執行資源或記憶體等原因造成無法推進的 stall 比例近似。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when instructions or effective time are unavailable
metrics.physical_meaning: 每秒退休的百萬指令數。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when cycles or effective time are unavailable
metrics.physical_meaning: 每秒累積的百萬 CPU cycles。
